title: The Billie and Bobbie Show
description: A brother/sister duo that tells knock-knock jokes and sings folk songs about friendship, sunshine, and sibling love.
altHero: Billie, a teen boy, and Bobbie, a teen girl, both wearing blonde wigs, singing in front of a gold curtain in matching red outfits
alt2: Billie and Bobbie in blue jumper outfits on stage
alt3: Billie and Bobbie hamming it up
alt4: Billie and Bobbie wearing glittery plaid vests
